section: M&R Schedule A: Assets and Unearned Income
layout_note: Typed attachment table, transposed spreadsheet layout: one asset per column, attribute labels down the left. 4 asset columns, all SP. This page mixes selection styles: most selections are black-filled cells, but two Amount-of-Income cells are marked with a typed 'X' (CPI Asia amount A:None, CVCI amount G). EIF marker row: CPI Asia, CVCI, VRIG are marked EIF; the MS Trigger PLUS note (SPWQR) is not. Transaction row is blank for all columns (null). Value of Asset: A:None->VRIG, D($15,001-$50,000)->CPI Asia, E($50,001-$100,000)->SPWQR, F($100,001-$250,000)->CVCI. Type of Income: 'Other Type of Income'->CPI Asia + CVCI (black band spanning cols 1-2, no write-in text visible), Dividends->VRIG, None->SPWQR. Amount of Income: A:None X-mark->CPI Asia, C($201-$1,000) black->VRIG, G($15,001-$50,000) X-mark->CVCI, A:None black->SPWQR.

rows.asset_name: MS Trigger PLUS Based on the Value of the EURO STOXX Banks Index due Nov 5, 2019

uncertainties.note: fund codes for CPI Asia and CVCI Cayman; characters read as A-I-I-5-1 and A-I-I-1-4 but the double-I could be 'll'; tesseract read 'All51'/'All14'

uncertainties.read: Other Type of Income (black-filled) for CPI Asia and CVCI, no write-in text
uncertainties.note: the 'Other Type of Income' row is filled for these two EIFs but no descriptive text is printed in a write-in cell
